0,First,#,All_HI_Z,Shape_Length,-1,-1;check "check" true true false 8 Text 0 0,First,#,All_HI_Z,check,0,7;min_z "min_z" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,All_HI_Z,min_z,-1,-1;max_z "max_z" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,All_HI_Z,max_z,-1,-1" #
CalculateField HI_Z_Simple RdSegInt !OBJECTID! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField HI_Z_Simple RdName !fullname! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
JoinField HI_Z_Simple RdSegInt HI_Z_Simple_StartV RdSegInt StartZ NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES
JoinField HI_Z_Simple RdSegInt HI_Z_Simple_EndV RdSegInt EndZ NOT_USE_FM # NO_INDEXES
CalculateField HI_Z_Simple Incline "Flipped" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField HI_Z_Simple tempSZ !EndZ! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField HI_Z_Simple tempEZ !StartZ! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField HI_Z_Simple StartZ !tempSZ! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField HI_Z_Simple EndZ !tempEZ! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField HI_Z_Simple FeetStartZ "!StartZ! * 3.28084" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField HI_Z_Simple FeetEndZ "!EndZ! * 3.28084" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField HI_Z_Simple SlopePct "(!max_z! - !min_z!) / !LenM! * 100" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField HI_Z_Simple SlopePct "(!StartZ! - !EndZ!) / !LenM! * 100" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
Append HI_Z_Simple_Flat_Roads HI_Z_Simple TEST # # # # NOT_UPDATE_GEOMETRY NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS USE_FEATURE_SERVICE_MODE

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
